About Me

Building the Web,
One Stack at a Time

I'm a passionate Full-Stack Developer with deep expertise in the MERN stack — MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js. I craft end-to-end web applications that are not just functional, but genuinely delightful to use.

My mastery in Web Application development spans from architecting scalable backends with RESTful APIs and real-time features, to building pixel-perfect, performance-optimized frontends that users love.

🎓 Master in Web Applications — Specialization in Full-Stack Architecture, Cloud Deployment & Performance Engineering

Web Application Mastery

🏗️

Scalable Architecture

Systems that grow with your business — microservices, event-driven patterns, and clean code principles.

📱

Responsive Design

Pixel-perfect interfaces on every device — mobile-first, cross-browser, WCAG accessible.

🔄

API Integration

Third-party APIs, payment gateways, OAuth providers, webhooks, and custom integrations.

🚀

Performance Engineering

Sub-second load times, 99%+ Lighthouse scores, database query optimization, and efficient caching.

🔒

Security-First Dev

OWASP best practices, secure authentication flows, data encryption, and vulnerability assessment.

Cloud Deployment

AWS, Vercel, DigitalOcean, Docker, CI/CD pipelines — production deployments with zero downtime.

🧪

Testing & QA

Unit tests, integration tests, E2E with Cypress/Playwright, TDD methodology for robust code.

🤝

Team Collaboration

Git workflows, code reviews, Agile/Scrum, technical documentation, and mentoring.
